keyEvents.text: Goal!  Barbados 0, Montserrat 1. Lyle Taylor (Montserrat) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the top right corner. Assisted by Jamie Allen.
Goal!  Barbados 1, Montserrat 1. Elijah Downey (Barbados) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Thierry Gale.
Alex Dyer (Montserrat) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Barbados 2, Montserrat 1. Thierry Gale (Barbados) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Hallam Hope.
